name: hjc
description: HJC (HuRong) is a leading Chinese capacitor manufacturer specializing in MLCC, aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors, and supercapacitors. With over 40 years of experience, HJC serves global markets including automotive, industrial, consumer electronics, and renewable energy sectors.
longDescription: Founded in 1984, HJC (HuRong Electronics) has grown to become one of China's premier capacitor manufacturers. The company operates state-of-the-art production facilities with complete vertical integration, from raw materials to finished products. HJC's comprehensive product portfolio includes multilayer ceramic capacitors (MLCC), aluminum electrolytic capacitors, metallized film capacitors, and electric double-layer capacitors (EDLC/supercapacitors). With annual production capacity exceeding 50 billion units, HJC serves major global customers in automotive, industrial automation, telecommunications, consumer electronics, and renewable energy applications. The company maintains ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and IATF 16949 certifications, ensuring the highest quality standards. As an authorized HJC distributor, we provide technical support, inventory management, and supply chain solutions for customers worldwide.

seoTitle: HJC Capacitor Distributor | MLCC, Electrolytic, Film, Supercapacitors
seoDescription: Authorized HJC (HuRong) capacitor distributor. Source MLCC, aluminum electrolytic, film capacitors, and supercapacitors. Technical support and selection guide available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of HJC capacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of HJC (HuRong) capacitors. We maintain direct relationships with HJC's sales and technical teams, ensuring access to genuine products, competitive pricing, and comprehensive technical support. As an authorized distributor, we offer full warranty coverage, factory-direct technical assistance, and access to HJC's complete product portfolio including MLCC, aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors, and supercapacitors. Our inventory includes both standard products and automotive-grade components qualified to AEC-Q200 standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify current inventory and discuss your specific capacitor requirements for your project.

faqs.question: What are HJC's core competitive advantages in the capacitor market?
faqs.answer: HJC's core competitive advantages include: 1) Vertical Integration - Complete control from raw materials to finished products, ensuring quality and cost competitiveness, 2) Massive Production Scale - Annual capacity exceeding 50 billion units across all product lines, 3) Automotive Expertise - IATF 16949 certification and extensive AEC-Q200 qualified product portfolio, 4) Technology Leadership - Continuous R&D investment in miniaturization, high-voltage, and high-temperature technologies, 5) Cost Efficiency - Competitive pricing without compromising quality, making HJC ideal for cost-sensitive applications, 6) Local Support - Strong technical support team with quick response times. These advantages make HJC particularly competitive in automotive, industrial, and high-volume consumer electronics markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider HJC for applications requiring high reliability at competitive pricing, especially in automotive and industrial sectors.

faqs.question: How does HJC compare to Japanese and Korean capacitor brands?
faqs.answer: HJC offers a compelling value proposition compared to Japanese and Korean brands: 1) Price Competitiveness - Typically 20-40% lower cost than Japanese brands with comparable quality, 2) Quality Standards - IATF 16949 and AEC-Q200 certifications match international competitors, 3) Lead Times - Shorter lead times due to local manufacturing and inventory, 4) Customization - More flexible for custom specifications and smaller MOQs, 5) Technology - Comparable performance in standard and automotive-grade products, 6) Supply Security - Reduced geopolitical risk with China-based manufacturing. While Japanese brands may lead in ultra-high-end niche applications, HJC provides excellent performance for mainstream automotive, industrial, and consumer applications at significantly better value.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose HJC for cost-sensitive applications where Japanese/Korean brand performance is not strictly required; consider alternatives only for mission-critical aerospace or military applications.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are HJC capacitors best suited for?
faqs.answer: HJC capacitors excel in several key industries: 1) Automotive - AEC-Q200 qualified MLCCs and electrolytics for EV powertrains, ADAS, and infotainment systems, 2) Industrial Automation - Long-life electrolytic and film capacitors for drives, inverters, and power supplies, 3) Consumer Electronics - High-volume MLCCs for smartphones, tablets, and wearables, 4) Renewable Energy - Film capacitors for solar inverters and wind power systems, 5) Telecommunications - High-frequency MLCCs for 5G base stations and network equipment, 6) LED Lighting - Cost-effective electrolytics for LED drivers. HJC's strength lies in high-volume, quality-sensitive applications where cost competitiveness is important. The company's automotive certifications make it particularly suitable for EV and hybrid vehicle applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find HJC capacitors optimized for your specific industry application.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of sourcing HJC capacitors through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Sourcing HJC capacitors through LiTong Electronics provides multiple benefits: 1) Authorized Distribution - Guaranteed genuine products with full factory warranty, 2) Technical Support - Access to HJC's application engineers and our in-house FAE team for selection assistance, 3) Inventory Management - Stocked inventory for common parts with consignment programs available, 4) Competitive Pricing - Volume discounts and flexible payment terms, 5) Quality Assurance - Incoming inspection and traceability documentation, 6) Supply Chain Services - Forecasting, VMI, and long-term agreements to ensure supply continuity, 7) Local Support - Chinese and English technical documentation and customer service. Our partnership with HJC ensures you receive authentic products with professional support throughout your project lifecycle.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for a quote and to discuss how we can support your HJC capacitor requirements with value-added services.

faqs.question: Does HJC offer automotive-grade capacitors qualified to AEC-Q200?
faqs.answer: Yes, HJC offers extensive AEC-Q200 qualified capacitor portfolios for automotive applications. Their automotive-grade products include: 1) MLCCs - X7R, X8R, and C0G dielectrics qualified to AEC-Q200 Rev E, available in case sizes from 0402 to 1210, 2) Aluminum Electrolytics - Long-life, high-temperature series (up to 150°C) with AEC-Q200 qualification, 3) Film Capacitors - PP and PET film capacitors for DC-link and snubber applications in EVs, 4) Supercapacitors - EDLCs for backup power and energy regeneration systems. HJC's IATF 16949 certification ensures automotive-grade quality management. These products are widely used in EV powertrains, battery management systems, ADAS, and infotainment applications by major automotive Tier 1 suppliers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request our automotive capacitor selection guide or contact our automotive FAE for AEC-Q200 qualified part recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time and MOQ for HJC capacitors?
faqs.answer: HJC capacitor lead times and MOQs vary by product type: 1) Standard MLCCs - Stock items available immediately; production lead time 4-6 weeks; MOQ typically 10,000-100,000 pieces depending on size, 2) Aluminum Electrolytics - Stock items 1-2 weeks; production 6-8 weeks; MOQ 1,000-10,000 pieces, 3) Film Capacitors - Stock items 1-2 weeks; production 8-10 weeks; MOQ 500-5,000 pieces, 4) Supercapacitors - Stock items 1-2 weeks; production 6-8 weeks; MOQ 100-1,000 pieces. As an authorized distributor, we maintain strategic inventory of high-demand parts to support immediate requirements. For large volume programs, we offer scheduled deliveries and VMI programs to optimize your supply chain. Custom specifications may require longer lead times and higher MOQs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team with your specific requirements for current lead times, pricing, and availability.
